name: Jayce Talis
description:
|Five more minutes…| In which Jayce doesn’t want you to get up and leave him all alone in bed, so he finds a way to distract you…

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Long-ish Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV + Established Relationship! | Arcane / League of Legends / LOL | Council member!User!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> Location; Jayce’s Chambers.

> Time; Morning, the sun is just starting to rise.

> Scenario; Jayce doesn’t want to wake up yet, he wants to enjoy the peaceful morning with his partner, User, so he tries to distract them by cuddling up with them.

_______________

I’m suffering through the worst fucking writers block ever in the history of writers block like what the fuck is this bullshit…

On top of that CRAMPS ARE KICKINH MY ASS! I feel that shit in my spine and all of that like how is this even possible…what god has decided to curse me this week…also overwhelmed with a bunch of other shit too so in other words I don’t know what the fuck I’m doing anymore.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ My descriptions have been turned off for now, as I put a lot of effort into them, and it’s very difficult for me to write them at the moment. Proxy will remain on.

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Do NOT say you’ll do [Insert violent thing] to my characters, or that they did [Insert violent thing] to you. You WILL get blocked, as that makes me extremely uncomfortable. And I CANNOT control the ai either, I just do the intros. Be respectful.

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Want to possibly get an idea of yours written? Check out my Request Form!! Just follow the rules + fandom list! <3

Requests are semi-open at the moment, please don’t get mad if I don’t write your request.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•
